title: CVB3 myocarditis sex differences - spleen 12h post-infection

biology.context: Very early innate response - max FC is 1.56x (modest)
biology.annotation_note: GPL6246 probe IDs are transcript cluster IDs; gene-level annotation requires platform soft file
biology.key_finding: Differential CVB3 response between sexes at 12h - sets up divergent myocarditis severity
biology.sex_interaction: Male vs female CVB3 response shows probe-level differences consistent with literature

note_on_panel_genes: GPL6246 probe IDs cannot be mapped to gene symbols without the platform annotation file (GPL6246.annot.gz). ISG induction at 12h post-infection in spleen is modest (max +0.64 log2FC = 1.56x), consistent with early innate response before peak viremia.
